extensionDescription.message: Remove ads and enhance Outlook web mailbox

cfg_hide_firstemail_ad_desc.message: Hide the first ad in the mail list

cfg_email_counter_desc.message: Show folder item count near the folder title

cfg_counter_color_desc.message: Choose the email counter color (rgb, rgba, hexa, color name)

cfg_align_title_desc.message: Remove extra spacing near the title

cfg_custom_background_desc.message: Use a custom image for the top bar

cfg_transparency_topbar_desc.message: Make top bar elements more transparent

cfg_support_rate_topbar_desc.message: Show the rating button in Outlook
